_comment: Template only — fill in CREDENTIALS before importing. Real workflow (with creds) lives in /tmp/ctrlhits_workflow.json (not committed).

_credentials_needed.radarr_api_key: Radarr API key from Settings > General

name: ctrlhits → Radarr Auto-Download

nodes.name: Extract Title Info
nodes.note: Extracts cleanTitle, year, newsId, articleUrl from RSS item

nodes.name: Process TMDb Result
nodes.note: Returns [] if no results (stops pipeline). Carries forward tmdbId, newsId, articleUrl.

nodes.name: Check Radarr Wants
nodes.note: Returns [] unless movie is monitored=true AND hasFile=false

nodes.name: Fetch Article HTML
nodes.note: GET article URL with cookie auth, responseFormat=text

nodes.name: Extract Download Links
nodes.note: HTML-unescapes page, regex-extracts filestore.me .rar and .rev links

nodes.name: JDownloader Add Links
nodes.note: POST http://192.168.1.10:3128/linkgrabberv2/addLinks — deprecated API, no auth needed on LAN

nodes.name: Log Success
nodes.note: Logs packageName + fileCount to execution log

flow: RSS → Extract → TMDb → ProcessTMDb → Radarr → CheckRadarr → Thanks → FetchHTML → ExtractLinks → JDownloader → Log
